markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy and operational model.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Shift from thought leadership to high-volume, data-driven content to capture AI visibility (AEO). This is a direct response to Prophecy's PLG launch and need for broad discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [**Operational Compromise:** To overcome internal quality concerns, content will be published under a `/guides` subfolder, separate from the main blog. This allows rapid experimentation without impacting the primary brand experience.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:** GrowthX will act as an extension of the Prophecy team, using a "workflow as code" platform and human editors to produce high-quality, fact-checked content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Prophecy's Focus Shift:** The company is moving beyond its data engineering roots to target analysts and analytics leaders. Content must now address their specific pain points and help them navigate internal gatekeepers.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Content Quality vs. Growth

  - [Raj Bains (Prophecy CEO) expressed concern that the previous content strategy produced "spam" that was not high-quality, citing Cursor and Lovable as examples of brands with a more selective approach.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli (GrowthX CEO) clarified GrowthX's model, which targets a different content spectrum:](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [**Not Thought Leadership:** GrowthX cannot replicate a founder's unique voice or opinion.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
      - [**High-Quality Informational Content:** The goal is to be the best answer to common customer questions, surpassing generic AI outputs (e.g., Perplexity) with superior research, fact-checking, and a product-aligned voice.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** LLMs currently favor high-volume formats like listicles for visibility. To compete, Prophecy must "play the game better" by producing high-quality content in these formats, even if they aren't traditional thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### The Solution: A New Content Strategy & Operational Model

  - [**Operational Compromise:** To address Raj's quality concerns, Cody Carmen proposed publishing the new content under a `/guides` subfolder, separate from the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows for rapid experimentation and signal gathering without impacting the primary brand experience. Content will still be discoverable via an HTML sitemap in the footer.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Map customer jobs-to-be-done and pain points by analyzing Reddit, LinkedIn, and search data to identify key questions.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Execution:** Use a "workflow as code" platform and human editors to produce content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
          - [**Workflow:** Research → Draft → Interlink → Fact-check → Refine.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
          - [**Quality Control:** A knowledge graph (RAG) can ground content in Prophecy's documentation for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [**Prophecy's Strategic Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
      - [The company is moving beyond its data engineering roots to target analysts and analytics leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The data engineering market is too competitive (e.g., Fivetran/dbt), and the business needs broader adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2669.0)
      - [**Content Implications:** Content must now address the specific pain points of analysts and help them navigate internal gatekeepers (e.g., data engineers, CDOs).](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2716.0)

### GrowthX's Value Proposition

  - [**Faster Signal Gathering:** Rapid content production enables faster validation of market hypotheses, providing insights beyond just traffic and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=3040.0)
  - [**Topical Authority:** High-volume content builds topical authority, which improves rankings for competitive, high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
  - [**Brand Awareness:** Increased discoverability and mentions (even without links) boost brand awareness, a key goal for Prophecy's upcoming PLG launch.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Wilton Kuffel & Cody Carmen:**](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
      - [Review the GrowthX AEO research document.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
      - [Align on the `/guides` content strategy and present it to Raj Bains.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [**Cody Carmen:**](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
      - [Meet with Kyle Gaudreau to discuss the AEO research (tentatively tomorrow, 1 PM MT).](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=3288.0)
  - [**Kyle Gaudreau:**](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
      - [Deliver the V1 strategy document by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call for next Wednesday to review the strategy and plan execution.](https://fathom.video/share/gn7sTfQaf7ety8fWAAMWTFfp4ux23Mqt?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
